verses.1: I said, “I will watch my ways, so that I don’t sin with my tongue.
verses.3: My heart was hot within me.
verses.5: Behold, you have made my days hand widths.
verses.6: “Surely every man walks like a shadow.
verses.7: Now, Lord, what do I wait for?
verses.8: Deliver me from all my transgressions.
verses.10: Remove your scourge away from me.
verses.11: When you rebuke and correct man for iniquity,
verses.12: “Hear my prayer, LORD, and give ear to my cry.
verses.13: Oh spare me, that I may recover strength,
